metadata.title: Clean 1v2 Clutch on Split with Sharp Aim and Smart Movement
metadata.description:
Here's a quick 1v2 clutch on Split where timing and positioning make all the difference. Notice the smooth peeks and steady shots that turn the round.
What’s your favorite angle on Split?
Share your best clutch moments in the comments!
